prompt: Ich möchte einen neuen Content-Block-Typ clientLogosStrip hinzufügen — eine ruhige horizontale Reihe von Kundenlogos. Es soll sowohl im CMS (apps/cms/src/fields/contentBlocks.ts) als auch im Astro-Renderer (apps/web/src/components/ContentBlocks.astro) verfügbar sein. Zeig beide Änderungen und erklär, wie es visuell ins System passt.

assertions.text: CMS block has German labels (singular + plural)
CMS block has at least a logos array field with image (relationship to media) and alt/caption
Astro renderer adds the block to the discriminated union type
Astro renderer has a render branch for blockType === 'clientLogosStrip'
Styling references design tokens (var(--font-mono), var(--ease), var(--muted) or similar) rather than hardcoded colors
Logos are displayed at uniform height with auto width (preserves aspect)
Default state desaturates / mutes logos (e.g., filter: grayscale, opacity reduction, or color-mix tint) — not full color
No card shadows (no box-shadow on cards), no border-radius > 4px
Explanation references at least one existing content block by name (textBlock, imageSequence, faqBlock, linkList, ctaBlock, quoteBlock)
Explanation addresses both dark and light section contexts
Explanation acknowledges the site's anti-patterns (no playful hover, no rounded cards, etc.)
